slidesWithAudio.subtitle: Score: 41/100
slidesWithAudio.narration: Your overall score is 41 out of 100. Technical at 50 and SEO at 64 show moderate performance. Performance at 17 and AI Visibility at 32 are underperforming and need immediate attention. These gaps are severely limiting your growth and require urgent action.

slidesWithAudio.title: Issue Distribution
slidesWithAudio.subtitle: 317 Total Issues
slidesWithAudio.narration: 317 issues found — and 170 of them are high priority. That means 54% of your problems are actively costing you rankings right now, today.

slidesWithAudio.title: High Priority Issues
slidesWithAudio.subtitle: Showing top 3 of 170 high-priority issues
slidesWithAudio.narration: These high priority issues are the ones bleeding your score the most. Every one of them fixed is a direct point gain — address them first and your overall score could jump significantly within 30 days.

issues.issue: Organization schema incomplete - missing recommended fields: address
issues.recommendation: Add sameAs array with social media URLs and address information for comprehensive entity representation.

issues.issue: Schema markup detected but not in JSON-LD format - crawlers may ignore it
issues.recommendation: Convert schema markup to JSON-LD format. JSON-LD is the preferred format for Google and provides better crawler support and easier maintenance.

issues.issue: Article schema validation failed: No Article schema found, No article schema to validate completeness, Publication dates not visible in page content
issues.recommendation: Address within 7 days - high priority for SEO improvement

slidesWithAudio.title: Medium Priority Issues
slidesWithAudio.subtitle: Showing top 3 of 147 issues
slidesWithAudio.narration: Your medium priority issues aren't urgent, but they're adding up quietly. Resolve these and you're not just fixing problems — you're sending search engines a signal that this site is actively maintained and trustworthy.

issues.issue: No keyword density detected - insufficient content analysis
issues.recommendation: Add substantial content with clear keyword focus. Ensure primary keywords appear naturally in headings, body text, and important HTML elements.

issues.issue: Page missing visible date information (schema dates present but not visible)
issues.recommendation: Add visible publication or last-updated date in page content. Use formats like 'Last updated: Month DD, YYYY' or 'Published: Month DD, YYYY' near the title or at the bottom of the content.
Add BreadcrumbList schema markup that matches your visible breadcrumb navigation. Include proper ListItem structure with name and item fields.

slidesWithAudio.narration: The good news is, there are no low-priority issues detected. This means your site is already clean at the foundational level, allowing you to focus on higher-impact improvements.

slidesWithAudio.narration: And now the most important score in today's world — AI Visibility. ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, AI search overviews — these are the new search engines. People aren't just searching online anymore, they're asking AI. And AI decides who to mention, who to recommend, who to trust. Your score is 32 — meaning right now, you're largely invisible in that conversation. This is the score that will define the next 5 years of your online presence.
